theme.style: Deep near-black roasted-obsidian canvases warmed by molten crema-gold and burnt-amber light blooms, evoking the intense heat and craft of a live espresso pull. Volumetric light rays, suspended micro-particles, and smooth liquid-gold gradients create a premium, sensory-rich atmosphere that feels specific to the world of serious home espresso. Backgrounds are dramatic and heat-driven at the bottom, calming to dark near-black at the top for text legibility.
theme.headlineFont: font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; — import via @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@800&display=swap')

slides.label: Extraction Timer
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art featuring a colossal molten crema-gold and deep amber luminous bloom erupting from the lower center of a near-black obsidian canvas, with soft volumetric light rays fanning upward and thousands of fine suspended particles catching the warm glow, the midframe transitioning through rich roasted-brown and burnt-copper gradients. Dramatic upward rim lighting from below casts long warm shadows across subtle grain texture, while liquid-gold arcs curve gently at the edges, adding depth and motion. The upper third fades smoothly to deep near-black for clean text overlay, the overall composition radiating intense heat and obsessive craft. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups
